summary: Frontend auth regression testing completed on public preview URL. Login/signup UIs render and local validations work, but real Supabase auth operations fail due missing client env vars; protected route redirect and logout redirect are not functioning in this environment.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button is visible but click does not redirect to /login; user remains on /dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: Submission always falls into generic error state ('Something went wrong. Please try again.') because Supabase browser client throws missing env vars.
Signup shows generic error state instead of real Supabase response due missing env vars in browser client initialization.
Unauthenticated visit to /quotes/create does not redirect to /login?next=... and returns 200; route protection is bypassed when Supabase env is missing.
Could not validate because no valid auth session could be created in this environment.
Could not validate authenticated create flow end-to-end due blocked sign-in; only unauthenticated access was observed (unexpectedly allowed).

issues: No blocking spacing/alignment/contrast issue found during this run.

action_items: Set preview/runtime env vars for Next app: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (and keep server-side Supabase keys aligned).
After env fix, retest middleware protected-route redirects and authenticated redirects for /login and /signup using valid credentials.
After env fix, retest logout flow to ensure successful signOut and redirect to /login.
Re-verify Quotes create flow under a real authenticated session.
critical_code_review_comments: RCA: /app/lib/supabase/client.ts throws 'Missing Supabase environment variables'; this breaks login/signup session checks and submit flows in browser.
RCA: /app/middleware.ts has early return when hasSupabaseEnv() is false, which disables route protection entirely in misconfigured environments.
Code-level behavior matches observed failures: console log shows 'Session check failed' and 'Logout failed' from createClient() throw paths.
test_credentials: MISSING/EMPTY for auth execution: /app/memory/test_credentials.md contains no usable login credentials.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://layout-overhaul-15.preview.emergentagent.com. Login/signup render and client validations pass. Integration auth flows fail because createClient() throws missing env vars. /quotes/create remains publicly accessible (no middleware redirect). Logout button exists but signOut fails and no redirect occurs.
rca of the issue: Repro: open /login?next=%2Fquotes%2Fcreate and submit credentials -> generic error. Console: Missing Supabase environment variables from lib/supabase/client.ts. Open /quotes/create unauthenticated -> stays on route (200), no redirect. Click logout on /dashboard -> stays on /dashboard; console shows Logout failed due same missing env error. Root cause: missing NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at runtime, plus middleware fallback that skips protection when env absent. Mitigation: provision env vars in preview deployment, then rerun auth flow tests with valid credentials.
